title: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

“Welcome! What’re ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].

options.title: Take the Top One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your relics[/gold] for [gold]a new relic from the pool[/gold].

options.title: Take the Middle One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your relics[/gold] for [gold]a new relic from the pool[/gold].

options.title: Take the Bottom One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your relics[/gold] for [gold]a new relic from the pool[/gold].

conditions: Each player must have at least 5 tradeable relics
notes: The event randomly selects [blue]3[/blue] of the player’s [gold]tradeable relics[/gold] (shuffled) and pairs each with a relic pulled from the front of the relic pool — the same relics you would receive from future elite rewards. Because the event requires 5+ tradeable relics to spawn, all three trade slots will always be filled. You may accept only one trade per visit. Not all relics are tradeable — some relics have a non-tradeable flag and will never appear as trade candidates.
